calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

SOPHIA ANDRITSAKIS, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CACH, LLC.
No appearance by defendant BOSCO K. TANG.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff CACH, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant BOSCO K. TANG as follows:

DAMAGES $8913.29; PRE JUDGMT INT 10% $2366.30; COSTS $284.; ATTY'S FEES $800.; TOTAL JUDGMT $12,363.59.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
